_meta.source: Destatis VSE 2022 — Extended role coverage for Germany
_meta.methodology: Germany earnings structure survey VSE 2022. Additional occupation groups beyond software developers: data analysts (ISCO 2529 / KldB 4312), product/IT managers (KldB 4313 / ISCO 1221), marketing and sales (KldB 1412 / ISCO 2431), finance analysts (KldB 7311), HR professionals (KldB 7312), design professionals (KldB 5412). Berlin city-level for key roles from federal state breakdown.
_meta.coverage: Germany national and Berlin federal state. Expanded role coverage for data, product, marketing, design, finance, HR.
_meta.limitations: KldB and ISCO codes map to broad occupation groups. Seniority inferred from earnings distribution. Berlin data is a Bundesland-level aggregate — not a strict city boundary.
_meta.currency_note: All figures in EUR gross annual.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 4312 — Data analysts, Germany national, mid
records.notes: Data analysts / BI analysts Germany. KldB 4312 data processing specialists. Maps to data-analyst. Consistent with Eurostat ISCO 2529 Germany figure.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 4312 — Data analysts, Germany national, junior
records.notes: Junior data analysts Germany. KldB Anforderungsniveau 2 (qualified professional, early stage).

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 4312 — Data analysts, Germany national, senior
records.notes: Senior data analysts / data scientists Germany. Anforderungsniveau 4 (expert level). Includes machine learning and AI engineering roles.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 4313 — IT project managers / product managers, Germany, mid
records.notes: IT coordinators and organisers Germany. KldB 4313. Maps to product-manager and it-project-manager roles. Aligned with Eurostat ISCO 1221 Germany figure.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 4313 — IT managers, Germany, senior
records.notes: Senior product managers / IT directors Germany. Upper quartile. Major tech companies (SAP, Siemens Digital, Deutsche Telekom, BMW Tech) push upper range.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 1412 — Marketing professionals, Germany national, junior
records.notes: Junior marketing / commercial management Germany. KldB 1412 Anforderungsniveau 2.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 1412 — Marketing managers, Germany national, senior
records.notes: Senior marketing managers and sales directors Germany. Anforderungsniveau 4. Maps to marketing-manager, sales-manager at manager/director level.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022 — Finance analysts, Germany national, mid
records.notes: Business consulting and organisation Germany. Maps to finance-analyst and business-analyst. KldB 7311.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022 — HR managers, Germany national, mid
records.notes: HR and people management professionals Germany. KldB 7312. Maps to hr-manager, people-ops roles.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022, KldB 5412 — Design professionals, Germany national, mid
records.notes: Graphic and communication designers Germany. KldB 5412. Maps to designer (UX/UI/product design). Tech-focused UX designers at digital companies tend toward upper end.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022 — Data analyst, Berlin federal state, mid
records.notes: Data analysts, Berlin federal state. Slightly below national median for data roles — Berlin startup market pays less than Munich/Frankfurt for non-SWE roles.

records._ref: Destatis VSE 2022 — Product manager, Berlin federal state, mid
records.notes: Product managers / IT coordinators, Berlin. Startup-heavy market — mix of well-funded scaleups (Zalando, Delivery Hero, N26, HelloFresh) and early-stage companies. Broad range.
